context: Tests whether the agent drafts a complete custom-origin support ticket containing every documented field (account, three subdomain preferences, SDKs and versions, China routing, DNS plan) AND notes the documented non-benefits, plus a small SDK initialization snippet with the custom origin parameter.

checklist.name: Subject heading exact
checklist.description: support-ticket.md begins with the heading exactly '# Subject: Request Custom Origin'

checklist.name: Account section includes the email and paid-keyset note
checklist.description: Account section includes 'platform-eng@acme.com' AND explicitly says it is the account on the paid production keyset(s)

checklist.name: Three subdomain choices in order
checklist.description: Subdomain Preferences section lists three choices in order of preference, with realtime.acme.com first and acmecorp.pubnubapi.com listed as one of the alternatives

checklist.name: SDKs and versions listed
checklist.description: SDKs in Use section lists both JavaScript v8.x and Java v9.x by name

checklist.name: China routing acknowledged
checklist.description: China Routing section explicitly states that the team has customers in China

checklist.name: DNS plan mentions CNAME
checklist.description: DNS Plan section says the team will add a CNAME record once PubNub provides the target endpoint, for realtime.acme.com

checklist.name: Operational notes cover all three non-benefits
checklist.description: Operational Notes section explicitly states all three of: does NOT improve latency, does NOT bypass IP allowlist requirements, does NOT increase per-host connection limits

checklist.name: initWithCustomOrigin uses origin param
checklist.description: custom-origin-init.js initializes PubNub with origin: customOrigin (the function argument)

checklist.name: ssl: true
checklist.description: PubNub init in custom-origin-init.js sets ssl: true

checklist.name: Keys loaded from env vars
checklist.description: publishKey and subscribeKey are read from process.env.PN_PUBLISH_KEY and process.env.PN_SUBSCRIBE_KEY (no literals)

checklist.name: JS comment notes paid-plan only
checklist.description: custom-origin-init.js top-of-file comment explicitly states this is paid-plan only and that the custom origin must be obtained via PubNub Support before the snippet works
